About Me

SEO professional.
Results-first mindset.

I'm Amal Joseph — an SEO consultant in Kerala with hands-on experience at TechWyse IT Solutions, Ernakulam. I combine technical SEO, content strategy, and local SEO to move businesses up Google's rankings — and keep them there.

My background in M.Com Finance & Taxation means I tie SEO strategy to business outcomes, not just traffic numbers. My work as a digital marketing strategist in Kerala also spans AEO and GEO — helping brands show up in AI-powered search results.

What I Do

Services built for
real organic growth.

From technical fixes to content strategy — everything a Kerala business needs to rank and convert.

⚙️

Technical SEO

Site audits, Core Web Vitals, crawlability fixes, and structured data — the foundation that makes rankings stick.

Technical SEO
Full site crawl with Screaming Frog and SEMrush. I fix broken links, duplicate content, slow page speeds, Core Web Vitals failures, missing schema markup, and crawl errors — everything Google needs to index and rank your site properly.
📍

Local SEO · Kerala

Google Business Profile optimisation, local citations, and map pack rankings — so customers near you find you first.

Local SEO · Kerala
Google Business Profile optimisation, geo-targeted landing pages, local citation building across Kerala directories, and map pack ranking strategy. District-level keyword targeting so you appear exactly where your customers are searching.
✍️

Content Strategy

Keyword research, topical authority mapping, and on-page optimisation that earns rankings and keeps readers engaged.

Content Strategy
Keyword research mapped to search intent — informational, commercial, and transactional. I build topic clusters that establish your site as a topical authority, then optimise every page for on-page signals, readability, and conversion.
🤖

AEO & AI Search

Answer Engine Optimisation and GEO — ensuring your brand is cited in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google's AI Overviews.

AEO & AI Search
Structured FAQ schema, entity signals, and citation-worthy content architecture so Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search, and Perplexity pull from your site. Your brand becomes the trusted answer — not just another search result.
🔗

On-Page & Off-Page SEO

Meta optimisation, internal linking strategy, and quality backlink building to strengthen your domain authority.

On-Page & Off-Page SEO
On-page: title tags, meta descriptions, heading hierarchy, keyword placement, and internal linking across every page. Off-page: ethical outreach for high-authority backlinks that strengthen domain authority — no PBNs, no spam, ever.
📊

SEO Audits & Reporting

Clear, actionable audits using SEMrush and Ahrefs. Monthly reports tied to traffic, leads, and revenue — not just rankings.

SEO Audits & Reporting
Monthly reports from GA4 and Google Search Console — ranking movement, organic traffic trends, click-through analysis, and a prioritised next-action list. Growth plan clients get a live Looker Studio dashboard they can check anytime.
🔍

Keyword & Competitor Research

Deep-dive analysis of what your competitors rank for — and a clear roadmap to outrank them on the terms that matter most.

Keyword & Competitor Research
Deep Ahrefs and SEMrush analysis of what your competitors rank for, where their backlinks come from, and which keyword gaps you can capitalise on immediately. Data-first targeting — no guesswork on what to go after.
🛒

E-Commerce SEO

Product page optimisation, category structure, and schema markup — so your store ranks organically and converts without relying solely on ads.

E-Commerce SEO
Product page optimisation, category URL structure, faceted navigation handling, Product and Review rich result schema, and bulk meta rewriting at scale. Built for WooCommerce and Shopify stores that want organic traffic — not just paid ad reliance.

How It Works

A clear process.
No guesswork.

Every engagement follows the same disciplined four-step framework — built around what actually moves rankings in Kerala and beyond.

Step 01

Audit & Discovery

Full technical crawl using SEMrush and Screaming Frog. I identify exactly what's holding your site back — from crawl errors to keyword gaps.

Step 02

Strategy & Prioritisation

A ranked action plan — quick wins first, long-term plays second. No generic templates; the strategy is built around your market and competition.

Step 03

Execution

On-page fixes, content improvements, local citations, and structured data — implemented cleanly and tracked from day one.

Step 04

Report & Refine

Monthly reports from GA4 and Google Search Console — ranking movement, traffic trends, and the next priority, explained clearly.

Google's Ranking Signals

I build what Google
actually rewards.

Google's E-E-A-T framework — Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trust — is the backbone of every strategy I build.

E

Experience

Real-world SEO execution at TechWyse IT Solutions — not theoretical. I've audited, fixed, and ranked sites across multiple industries.

E

Expertise

Google Analytics certified, M.Com qualified, and trained across SEMrush, Ahrefs, and GSC. I know the tools and the theory behind them.

A

Authoritativeness

Building topical authority through structured content clusters and quality backlinks — so Google recognises your site as the go-to source.

T

Trustworthiness

White-hat only. Transparent monthly reporting. No lock-in contracts. You always know what's being done and why.

"
Across the projects I've worked on, organic search has consistently delivered qualified traffic long after the initial optimization work was completed.

SEO Expert in Kerala

What separates a Kerala
SEO expert from the rest.

Kerala's search market is unlike any other state in India. It's bilingual, mobile-first, and has one of the highest internet penetration rates in the country. Ranking here means understanding how people in Alappuzha search differently from someone in Kozhikode — the intent, the language mix, and the competitive density vary district by district.

That local fluency is something a remote agency or a generic SEO tool can't replicate. Hiring an SEO expert in Kerala who knows the market from the inside means faster, more targeted results — and a strategy that doesn't need to be rebuilt after the first audit reveals misaligned assumptions.

The goal isn't just to rank. It's to rank for the right searches — the ones your actual customers are typing — and convert that visibility into real business outcomes.

Bilingual keyword strategy

English and Malayalam search terms are both tracked and targeted — capturing the full spectrum of how Kerala audiences search across devices.

District-level local SEO

Hyperlocal targeting across all 14 Kerala districts — so your business shows up where your customers actually are, not just statewide.

Mobile-first by default

Over 85% of searches in Kerala happen on mobile. Every technical and on-page decision is made with mobile experience and Core Web Vitals at the centre.

Kerala business categories

Tourism, real estate, education, healthcare, and local services — industries where Kerala SEO competition is highest and where the right strategy makes the biggest difference.

Search-first strategy

Every digital marketing decision starts with search data — what people are already looking for, not what we assume they want. SEO informs content, ad targeting, and messaging.

Organic over paid dependency

Paid channels are powerful but fragile. The focus here is building organic equity that keeps delivering — traffic, leads, and brand visibility — long after the campaign ends.

Data-backed decisions

GA4, Google Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs form the reporting backbone. Every recommendation comes with data behind it — not assumptions or gut feel.

Full-funnel thinking

Ranking is just the start. The strategy connects search visibility to landing page quality, user journey, and conversion — so traffic actually turns into business.

Digital Marketing Strategist · Kerala

SEO is the foundation.
Strategy is what builds on it.

Good SEO doesn't operate in isolation. The best results come when search strategy connects with content, user experience, and conversion — which is where the role of a digital marketing strategist in Kerala goes beyond just rankings.

Search intent reveals exactly what your audience wants at every stage — awareness, consideration, and purchase. Building content and site architecture around that intent is what separates businesses that rank and convert from those that rank and bounce.

This integrated approach is especially valuable for Kerala businesses competing in categories where a few Page 1 spots determine the majority of leads — tourism, real estate, education, and professional services chief among them.

FAQ

Questions people ask
before hiring an SEO expert.

Are you an SEO consultant or an agency?

+

I work as an independent SEO professional in Kerala — no middlemen, no account managers. You work directly with me, which means faster decisions and more personal attention to your project.

How long before I see results from SEO?

+

Technical fixes show up within weeks. Meaningful keyword movement typically takes 3–6 months depending on competition and domain age. I set clear, realistic timelines upfront — no vague promises.

Do you work with businesses outside Kerala?

+

Yes. While I specialise as an SEO expert in Kerala, I work with clients across India. My tools and reporting are fully remote-friendly — all work is tracked and shared transparently.

What does an SEO project with you look like?

+

It starts with a full audit using SEMrush and Google Search Console, followed by a prioritised action plan. I handle everything from on-page fixes to content and backlinks, with monthly reporting throughout.

Is SEO dead in 2026? I keep hearing that.

+

SEO isn't dead — it's evolved. People have declared SEO dead after every major Google update, the rise of social media, and now AI. Yet organic search still drives more website traffic than any other channel. What's dead is keyword stuffing, link spam, and thin content. What works in 2026 is topical authority, E-E-A-T signals, structured data, and content that genuinely answers what people are searching for. If anything, AI Overviews have raised the bar — which means businesses with strong SEO foundations are pulling further ahead of those without.

Why should I hire an SEO expert instead of doing it myself?

+

SEO has a steep learning curve — and the cost of doing it wrong is months of lost time and potential Google penalties. An SEO expert brings the tools (SEMrush, Ahrefs, GSC), the technical knowledge, and the pattern recognition from working across multiple sites and industries. You could learn to do your own accounting too, but most business owners hire an accountant because their time is better spent elsewhere. Same logic applies here — except SEO mistakes can actively hurt your rankings, not just slow growth.

Why is SEO still important for my business in 2026?

+

Because your customers are still searching. Every day, billions of queries go into Google — people looking for products, services, answers, and local businesses. The difference is they now expect instant, trustworthy results. If your business isn't ranking on Page 1, you're invisible to a massive share of potential customers who will never scroll further. Unlike paid ads that stop the moment you stop paying, SEO builds compounding organic visibility — traffic that grows over time without a per-click cost.

How does an SEO expert in Kerala help my business grow?

+

In practical terms: more of the right people find your business when they search for what you offer. A Kerala-based SEO expert understands local search intent — what a customer in Kochi searches versus someone in Kozhikode, what Malayalam and English keyword combinations drive conversions, and which local directories and citation sources actually move the needle here. The result is more qualified website traffic, more enquiries, and more revenue — without doubling your ad spend.

What's the difference between SEO and paid ads (Google Ads)?

+

Paid ads give you immediate visibility — but the moment you stop paying, you disappear. SEO builds organic rankings that grow and hold over time. Most businesses benefit from both, but SEO is the long-term foundation. Studies show that organic results receive significantly more clicks than paid ads for most search queries — and users tend to trust them more. For Kerala businesses with limited marketing budgets, SEO typically delivers a better return on investment over a 12-month horizon.
